creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
I just updated my builder box and added the latest 11.0-RC1 and head branch. It tends to built good with the newer one as in the following.
http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/qemu/2.6.1/110amd64-default.log
http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/qemu/2.6.1/110i386-default.log
http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/qemu/2.6.1/120amd64-default.log
http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/qemu/2.6.1/120i386-default.log

I am just not sure about whats happening in the original builder. :(
